aria.description: Patchline AI MCP server — 18 tools for catalog, playlist targeting, artist intelligence, pitch generation, and smart links. OAuth via Cognito on first tool call; token persisted by the Claude MCP client.
aria._comment_about_auth: Remote MCP with OAuth 2.0 / RFC 8414 metadata + RFC 9728 protected-resource metadata. No manual credentials required — Claude Code opens the browser to /auth/mcp-callback on first use.
